title: Ulaanbaatar Department Store
summary: The Ulaanbaatar Department Store (Mongolian: Улаанбаатар Их Дэлгүүр) is one of the largest and most well-known shopping centers in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia, located in Sükhbaatar District.
text:
The Ulaanbaatar Department Store (Mongolian: Улаанбаатар Их Дэлгүүр) is one of the largest and most well-known shopping centers in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia, located in Sükhbaatar District.

History
The department store was officially opened on January 11, 2010.

Features
The Ulaanbaatar Department Store spans six floors and includes a variety of retail outlets and services:

Retail: Offers clothing, electronics, and beauty supplies.
Supermarket
